name: Action
description: Fast-paced games centered on physical challenges, combat, and reflexes.

name: Adventure
description: Story-driven games focused on exploration, puzzle-solving, and narrative progression.

name: Battle Royale
description: Large-scale last-player-standing games where players fight in a shrinking arena.

name: Card and Deck-Building
description: Games where players build and manage a hand or deck of cards to defeat opponents or overcome challenges.

name: Educational
description: Games designed to teach real-world knowledge or skills while entertaining the player.

name: Fighting
description: Competitive games where players control characters in one-on-one or small-group combat.

name: First-Person Shooter
description: Shooter games played from the first-person perspective, emphasizing gunplay and spatial awareness.

name: Horror
description: Games designed to frighten the player through atmosphere, tension, and frightening encounters.

name: Idle and Clicker
description: Minimally interactive games where progression is automated and numbers scale exponentially over time.

name: Metroidvania
description: Side-scrolling exploration platformers with interconnected maps and abilities unlocked progressively to access new areas.

name: Multiplayer Online Battle Arena
description: Team-based strategy games where players control individual characters to destroy the opposing team's base.

name: Music and Rhythm
description: Games where the core mechanic involves matching on-screen prompts to the beat of music.

name: Open World / Sandbox
description: Games featuring large, freely explorable worlds with minimal linear restrictions on player progression.
notable_examples: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild

name: Platformer
description: Games focused on navigating environments by jumping between platforms and avoiding obstacles.

name: Puzzle
description: Games centered on solving problems using logic, pattern recognition, or spatial reasoning.

name: Racing
description: Competitive games where players race vehicles against opponents or the clock.

name: Real-Time Strategy
description: Strategy games where players simultaneously manage resources, build bases, and command units against opponents in real time.

name: Roguelite
description: Games featuring procedurally generated levels, permadeath or run-based progression, and randomized content.

name: Role-Playing Game
description: Games where players control a character that gains experience and abilities through a narrative-driven adventure.

name: Simulation
description: Games that model real-world or fictional systems for players to manage and control.

name: Sports
description: Games that simulate athletic competitions and sports events.

name: Stealth
description: Games that reward avoiding detection and completing objectives without direct confrontation.

name: Third-Person Shooter
description: Shooter games played from a camera positioned behind and above the player character.

name: Tower Defense
description: Strategy games where players place defensive structures to prevent waves of enemies from reaching a goal.

name: Turn-Based Strategy
description: Strategy games where players take alternating turns to plan and execute moves without time pressure.

name: Visual Novel
description: Narrative-driven games presented through illustrated text-based storytelling, often with branching dialogue and multiple endings.

name: Massively Multiplayer Online
description: Online games supporting thousands of simultaneous players in a shared persistent world.

name: Survival
description: Games where players must gather resources and manage health, hunger, or other meters to survive in a hostile environment.

name: Sports Management
description: Games where the player acts as a coach, manager, or owner of a sports team rather than playing directly.

name: Narrative / Walking Simulator
description: Experience-focused games with minimal mechanical challenge that prioritize story, atmosphere, and player exploration.
